name: C-beam 4080 1m extrusion
description: Primary 1m C-beam extrusion for the frame.

name: Straight Line Internal Connectors
description: Aluminum bars joining 1m C-beams to form 2m gantry rail. Four connector bars per joint, three butt joints in M3-2.

name: X-Direction Internal Reinforcement (custom 2m cut)
description: Custom 2m cut 2040 bars bonded with JB Weld inside the C-beam cavity.
notes: West System adhesive for permanent assembly.
